label: Identifier
documentation: Used by Minecraft to identify files in a resource pack. Many functions require an Identifier instead of a plain string.

label: Resources
documentation: Allows access to file contents within resource packs and utility functions for AWT resources like Fonts.

label: id
documentation: Create an Identifier based on the string. Example: `Resources.id("mtr:path/absolute.js")`.

label: idr
documentation: Create an Identifier based on the relative directory of the currently executed script. **Note:** Must be used during the script parsing stage.

label: read
documentation: Read an asset/file in the resource pack. Returns a `DataReader` to read the file's content, or null if it doesn't exist.

label: exist
documentation: Returns whether the specified file exists in the resource pack.

label: manager
documentation: [Deprecated] Returns Minecraft's native resource manager. Currently returns null for cross-version compatibility.

label: readString
documentation: [Deprecated] Reads the contents of a resource file as a string.

label: readBufferedImage
documentation: [Deprecated] Loads an image file as an AWT BufferedImage.

label: readFont
documentation: [Deprecated] Load a custom TTF or OTF font file as an AWT Font. Note: Creates temporary files on disk.

label: getSystemFont
documentation: Get a system or MTR built-in AWT font. Supported names: `Noto Serif`, `Noto Sans Semibold`, `Noto Sans CJK TC Medium`, `Serif`, `SansSerif`, `Monospaced`.

label: getFontRenderContext
documentation: Obtain an AWT FontRenderContext for dimension measurement of text.

label: ensureStrFonts
detail: Resources.ensureStrFonts(text: String, primaryFont: Font, fallbackFonts: Font[]): AttributedString
documentation: Get an AttributedString with font fallback logic to prevent 'Tofu' (empty squares) when rendering text with unsupported characters.
